mapper.select:
SELECT ssp.* FROM store_seller_promotion as ssp LEFT JOIN (SELECT a.id, a.prom_id, a.goods_title, b.product_name, b.brand_id, b.brand_name FROM store_promotion_goods a LEFT JOIN kol_product b ON a.kol_product_id = b.id ) spg on ssp.id = spg.prom_id ${sql} where ssp.is_del != 1
and (ssp.seller_id = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.sellerId} or ssp.counselor_user_id = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.counselorUserId})
and ssp.prom_title like CONCAT('%', #{storeSellerPromotionModel.promTitle}, '%')
and ssp.seller_name like CONCAT('%', #{storeSellerPromotionModel.sellerName}, '%')
and ssp.extension_code like '%${storeSellerPromotionModel.extensionCode}%'
and spgc.celebrity_prom_status = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.celebrityPromStatus}
and ssp.pay_status = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.payStatus}
and spg.goods_title like CONCAT('%', #{storeSellerPromotionModel.goodsTitle}, '%')
and scp.account like '%${storeSellerPromotionModel.kolAccount}%'
and ssp.create_time > '2025-01-01 00:00:00'
and ssp.prom_type = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.promType}
GROUP BY ssp.id ORDER BY ssp.create_time DESC

SELECT id, extension_code, prom_title FROM store_seller_promotion WHERE 1 = 1
and extension_code like '%${code}%'

SELECT ssp.*, qn.sid as sid, qn.qr_code as qrCode, qn.nickname FROM store_seller_promotion as ssp RIGHT JOIN (SELECT ssu.id, su.id sid, su.qr_code, su.nickname, su.username, su.counselor_user_id FROM sys_user as su LEFT JOIN sys_user as ssu ON su.id = ssu.seller_counselor_id WHERE su.user_type = 3 AND su.nickname != '' AND ssu.username != '') qn ON ssp.seller_id = qn.id where is_del != 1
AND qn.sid = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.sid}
AND qn.counselor_user_id = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.counselorUserId}
-- 未开始单数
AND prom_status = 0
-- 进行中单数
AND prom_status = 10
-- 已结束（异常）单数
AND prom_status = 90
-- 已结束（正常）单数
AND prom_status = 99
-- 只收意向金单数
AND intention_amount > 0 AND (payment_amount = 0 OR payment_amount IS NULL)
-- 已付意向金单数
AND intention_amount > 0
-- 已付订金单数
AND payment_amount > 0 AND pay_status < 20
-- 已付全款单数
AND pay_status = 20
-- 有退款订单单数
AND refund_amount > 0
AND ssp.celebrity_user_id = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.celebrityUserId}
AND DATE_FORMAT(ssp.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{storeSellerPromotionModel.startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(ssp.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{storeSellerPromotionModel.endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY ssp.create_time DESC

SELECT ssp.* FROM store_seller_promotion as ssp where ssp.is_del != 1 and ssp.prom_type = 1
and (ssp.seller_id = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.sellerId} or ssp.counselor_user_id = #{storeSellerPromotionModel.counselorUserId})
and ssp.extension_code like '%${storeSellerPromotionModel.extensionCode}%'
AND (
FIND_IN_SET(#{platform}, ssp.prom_platform) > 0
)
AND ssp.prom_budget like CONCAT('%', #{storeSellerPromotionModel.promBudget}, '%')
ORDER BY ssp.create_time DESC
